productDisplayName: Salomon Men Black S-wind Premium Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteClassed as a mountain and trekking product, the salomon S-Wind Premium is an outdoor shoe that's perfect for all adventure enthusiasts. It is extremely lightweight with a sleek upper that has mimimal overlays for a featherlight feel. The brand does not disappoint, this shoe is designed with top quality materials with each feature supporting a specific functionality. It has an easy slip on styling with textile inserts in the shoe for a free 360 degree movement and flexing. The sole construction is designed to cushion every stride - now, what more reasons do you need to invest in this pair?Product DetailsSynthetic upper with a great wearing comfortSynthetic sole and a micro-fibre footbed coverWelded Sensifit Technology in the Quicklace toggle style lace systemInjected EVA midsoleNon marking outsole called ContaGrip for a good holdMaterial and CareSyntheticRemove dirt with a soft wet brush and clean waterDo not machine wash or dry under the sunDry in room temperatureFor specific care instructions on each part of this shoe, refer booklet that comes with this shoe
